title: Adventurous Pepper Salad
description: A spicy and fluffy Syrian dish featuring a vegan-friendly vinaigrette dressing, with caramelized peppers adding a delightful twist.
instructions: Toast the red bell peppers in a skillet over medium heat until charred, then place in a sealed container to steam for about 10 minutes.
In a blender or food processor, combine olive oil, apple cider vinegar, Dijon mustard, and water. Blend until smooth.
Add salt and pepper to taste into the dressing mixture.
Slice the toasted peppers thinly and mix them with the vinaigrette dressing.
Caramelize the green bell peppers by roasting them under a broiler or in a skillet until they are lightly browned, then set aside.
Assemble the salad by layering the caramelized green peppers over the sliced red peppers.
Garnish with paprika powder to enhance the flavor and presentation.
